ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the park's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the park's location */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode where the park is located */,
  "walk_score" INTEGER /* Walk Score of the park area */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the park in square meters */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the park in meters */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last park inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled park inspection */,
  "park_category" TEXT /* Category of the park (e.g., neighborhood park, regional park) */,
  "park_type" TEXT /* Type of park (e.g., nature reserve, urban garden) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the feature is located */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., playground, parking lot, restrooms) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_features_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the image is taken */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_images_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the amenity is located */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., playground, picnic area) */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the amenity available in the park */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the amenity (e.g., operational, under repair) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., mowing, cleaning, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_PRIORITY" TEXT /* Priority of the maintenance (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., park manager, maintenance worker) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member's supervisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES supervisors ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisors" (
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisor */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the supervisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supervisor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supervisor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the supervisor (e.g., park manager, maintenance supervisor) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the supervisor was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the supervisor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review or comment provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_category" TEXT /* Category of the rating (e.g., cleanliness, amenities, overall experience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., resident, visitor, community leader) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, festival, workshop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES event_organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the event organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the event organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the event organizer */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the event organizer represents */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., non-profit, business, community group) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sponsor */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the sponsor represents */,
  "sponsored_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the sponsor is supporting */,
  "sponsored_park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the sponsor is supporting */,
  "sponsored_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship provided */,
  "sponsorship_date" TEXT /* Date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., monetary, in-kind, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_sponsored_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsored_park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_sponsored_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsored_event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park visit */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park visited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who visited the park */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "visit_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the visit (e.g., recreation, exercise, relaxation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_visits_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the weather data was recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the park on the given date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the park on the given date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the park on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public transportation data point */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the public transportation data was recorded */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the public transportation stop */,
  "stop_distance" REAL /* Distance from the park to the public transportation stop */,
  "route_number" INTEGER /* Route number of the public transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_transportation_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park rule */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the rule applies */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., hours of operation, pet policy, noise restriction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_rules_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park alert */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the alert applies */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., weather warning, maintenance notice, event announcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_alerts_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id")
)
